testcase.classname: To Validate the facebook login Functionallity
testcase.name: Invalid Login-To validate the login functionallity with Invalid Credentials
testcase.system-out: Given The user should be in facebook page...................................passed When The user has to fill the username "ramesh@gmail.com" and password "52345672"..passed And The user has to click the login button..................................passed Then The user should be navigate to invalid login page......................passed

testcase.classname: To Validate the facebook login Functionallity
testcase.name: Valid Login-To validate the login functionallity with Invalid Credentials
testcase.system-out: Given The user should be in facebook page...................................passed When The user has to fill the username "manoj@gmail.com" and password "42345672"..passed And The user has to click the login button..................................passed Then The user should be navigate to invalid login page......................passed

testcase.classname: To Validate the facebook login Functionallity
testcase.name: Invalid Register-To Validate the Registration Functionallity
testcase.system-out: Given The user should be in facebook page...................................passed When The user has to click the create new account button....................passed And The user has to fill the firstname,lastName and other details...........passed And The user has to click the submit button.................................passed Then The user should be get successfully registered meassage................passed

testcase.classname: To Validate the facebook login Functionallity
testcase.name: Valid Register-To Validate the Registration Functionallity
testcase.system-out: Given The user should be in facebook page...................................passed When The user has to click the create new account button....................passed And The user has to fill the firstname,lastName and other details...........passed And The user has to click the submit button.................................passed Then The user should be get successfully registered meassage................passed
